name: Cloud Resources and Services Enumerated in Container
description: Enumeration of cloud services and resources, including 'IAM roles,' 'security groups,' 'identity credentials,' and 'public IPv4 address,' was detected and initiated by a Kubernetes pod. Further investigation is needed to confirm the legitimacy or malicious intent of this activity.

rules.name: Cloud Resources and Services Enumerated in Container

author: Sunil Bharti
